strengths: ~16 years of broad software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backends
Founder of GISCollective demonstrating long-term ownership and platform design
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise, published AI products, or research credentials expected at Principal level
No evidence of director-level IC influence, advising strategic customers, or shaping cloud product strategy
Lacks advanced degree and deep cloud-platform architecture experience preferred for the role

key_factors.factor: Director-level IC and strategic advisory experience
Breadth of full-stack and systems engineering experience

response.justification: The role demands a director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, cloud platform strategy fluency, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers. The résumé shows a strong hands-on senior/staff engineer with ~16 years of varied experience and recent, light exposure to agentic tooling (MCP generators at re:cinq), but no shipped AI products, no ML research, no evidence of cloud-platform strategy work, and no track record of influencing organizations at a principal/director scope. Titles top out at Staff, and cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK usage rather than platform design.
